field_inventory_role: identifies the exact RestrictedCompositionTarget fields needed before any terminal composition extraction witness can be attempted

required_fields.role: candidate source for terminal composition closure content
candidate guard preserving restricted-only closure use
candidate bridge from the restricted target to restricted lift-source-chain composition content

positive_claim: records the field inventory needed before attempting any extraction witness from RestrictedCompositionTarget
missing_object: actual extraction witness using the listed RestrictedCompositionTarget fields
non_claims: does not extract terminal composition closure content
does not construct an unrestricted zero-day closure
does not erase the restricted boundary
does not prove the restricted-to-unrestricted lift
does not add SNOLAB or external empirical evidence
next_weakest_point: Add a verifier guard that rejects any field inventory attempting to promote restricted fields into unrestricted ZeroDayClosure.
